rooms.name: Suite — Pyramid View & Spa Bathtub
rooms.description: Our flagship suite offers breathtaking direct views of the Giza Pyramids from your private window. Featuring a luxurious spa bathtub, soundproofed walls, and premium Egyptian cotton bedding, this is the ultimate Venus Hotel experience.

rooms.name: Twin Room — Pyramid View & Jacuzzi
rooms.description: Wake up to iconic Pyramid views from your twin-bed room complete with a private Jacuzzi. Soundproofed for total tranquility, this room blends comfort with one of the world's most spectacular vistas.

rooms.name: Twin Room — Partial Pyramid View
rooms.description: A spacious twin room with a partial view of the Giza Pyramids. Fully soundproofed with all modern amenities, perfect for two travelers seeking comfort and a glimpse of ancient wonders.

rooms.name: Family Twin Room — Pyramid View
rooms.description: Our largest twin room, designed for families. Enjoy direct Pyramid views with extra space, multiple beds, and all the comforts of home. Soundproofed and fully air-conditioned.

rooms.name: Double Room — Pyramid View
rooms.description: A cozy double room with a stunning direct view of the Giza Pyramids. Features a comfortable double bed, private bathroom with rainfall shower, and all essential amenities.

rooms.name: Comfort Double or Twin Room
rooms.description: A well-appointed comfort room available in double or twin configuration. Soundproofed with free WiFi, quality bedding, and a private bathroom — ideal for a relaxing stay near the Pyramids.

rooms.name: Single Room — Pyramid View
rooms.description: A compact yet charming single room with a direct view of the Giza Pyramids. Perfect for solo travelers who want the iconic view without compromise.

rooms.name: Triple Room — Pyramid View
rooms.description: Spacious triple room with three beds and a direct Pyramid view. Great for small groups or families, with soundproofing and all modern comforts included.

rooms.name: Rooftop Terrace Room
rooms.description: Exclusive access to our famous rooftop terrace with 360° panoramic views of the Giza Pyramids and Cairo skyline. Watch the sunset over the Pyramids from your private terrace — a truly once-in-a-lifetime experience.

rooms.name: Presidential Suite — Ultimate Luxury
rooms.description: Experience the absolute peak of Egyptian hospitality in our Presidential Suite. Located on the top floor with unmatched views, featuring gold-leaf accents, a private lounge, and a personal spa area.

rooms.name: Deluxe Double Room — City View
rooms.description: A modern and stylish room featuring vibrant views of Old Cairo. Equipped with a plush double bed and contemporary amenities, it's perfect for travelers who enjoy the energy of the city.

rooms.name: Garden View Twin Room
rooms.description: Find peace in our Garden View room, overlooking the hotel's lush internal courtyard. A quiet retreat from the bustling Giza streets, featuring two comfortable single beds.

rooms.name: Economy Single — Internal View
rooms.description: Essential comfort for the budget-conscious solo traveler. A functional interior room that provides all the basics needed for a good night's sleep near the Pyramids.

rooms.name: Superior Family Suite
rooms.description: Bring the whole family together in our spacious Superior Suite. Features two separate bedrooms, a small dining area, and partial views of the Great Pyramid.

rooms.name: Honeymoon Suite — Romantic Getaway
rooms.description: Celebrate your love with a dedicated romantic suite. Includes a private balcony with Pyramid views, rose petal decoration on arrival, and a luxurious king-sized bed.

rooms.name: Pharaonic Themed Room
rooms.description: Immerse yourself in history with our Pharaonic-themed room. Featuring authentic Egyptian art, custom lighting, and decor reminiscent of the grand era of the Pharaohs.

tours.title: Giza Pyramids, Saqqara & Memphis
tours.description: Visit one of the Seven Wonders of the World! Your guide takes you to the 5,000-year-old Necropolis in Giza — the Great Pyramids of Cheops, Chephren, and Mykerinus, guarded by the Great Sphinx. Then discover the Step Pyramid at Saqqara and Memphis, the first ancient capital of Egypt.
highlights: Great Pyramids of Cheops, Chephren & Mykerinus
Memphis — Statue of Ramses II & Alabaster Sphinx
excludes: Any extras not mentioned in the itinerary

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
Giza Plateau — Pyramids of Cheops, Chephren & Mykerinus
The Great Sphinx & Valley Temple of Chephren
Lunch at a local restaurant (if included)
Step Pyramid of Saqqara — world's oldest stone structure
Memphis — Statue of Ramses II & Alabaster Sphinx
Return transfer to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: Giza Pyramids, Sphinx & Egyptian Museum
tours.description: Stand at the foot of the Great Pyramids built for Cheops, Chefren and Mycerinus, guarded by the Great Sphinx. Then admire over 250,000 artifacts from Ancient Egypt in the Egyptian Museum — including the legendary Tutankhamun treasures, gold and jewelry sealed in his tomb for 3,500 years.
excludes: Any extras not mentioned in the itinerary

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
Giza Plateau — Pyramids of Cheops, Chefren & Mycerinus
The Great Sphinx, Ra Tomb & Valley Temple
Lunch at a local restaurant (if included)
Egyptian Museum — Pharaonic artifacts & Tutankhamun collection
Return transfer to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: Saqqara, Memphis & Dahshur
tours.description: Visit the Step Pyramid at Saqqara — the world's oldest major stone structure — then Dahshur to enter the Red Pyramid (oldest true pyramid in history) and see the Bent Pyramid. Finish at Memphis, the first capital of Egypt, to see the Statue of Ramses II and the Alabaster Sphinx.
highlights: Step Pyramid of King Djoser (3rd Dynasty)
Red Pyramid — oldest true pyramid in history
excludes: Any extras not mentioned in the itinerary

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
Saqqara — Step Pyramid of King Djoser
Dahshur — Red Pyramid (enter inside) & Bent Pyramid
Lunch at a local restaurant
Memphis — Statue of Ramses II & Alabaster Sphinx
Return transfer to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: Desert Safari by Quad Bike at Giza Pyramids
tours.description: Experience the wonders of the ancient world through Quad Biking at Giza Pyramids — the only place in Egypt where you can ride through the desert with a panoramic view of the Pyramids of Cheops, Chephren, and Mykerinus. A truly unique adventure.
highlights: Quad biking in the Sahara Desert
Panoramic views of all 3 Giza Pyramids

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
Arrive at Giza desert — safety briefing
Quad bike ride through the desert with Pyramid views
Camel photo stop & panoramic Pyramid views
Return transfer to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: Egyptian Museum, Khan El Khalili & Old Cairo
tours.description: Enjoy Cairo's greatest cultural highlights in one day: the Egyptian Museum with 5,000 years of art, the vibrant Khan El Khalili bazaar in Islamic Cairo, and the ancient Coptic churches of Old Cairo including the Hanging Church and Church of Abu Serga.
highlights: Khan El Khalili — Cairo's famous bazaar
Church of St. Barbara & Church of Abu Serga
excludes: Any extras not mentioned in the program

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
Egyptian Museum — Pharaonic artifacts & Tutankhamun collection
Lunch at a local restaurant
Islamic Cairo — Khan El Khalili bazaar
Coptic Cairo — Hanging Church, Church of St. Barbara & Abu Serga
Return transfer to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: Museum, Citadel & Old Cairo
tours.description: Admire artifacts from Ancient Egypt in the Egyptian Museum, then visit the Salah El Din Citadel (1183 AD) and the stunning Mohamed Ali Alabaster Mosque inside. Tour Old Cairo's historic Coptic churches, the Ben Ezra Synagogue, and the ancient Roman fort.
highlights: Citadel of Salah El Din (1183 AD)
Church of St. Barbara & Abu Serga
excludes: Any extras not mentioned in the itinerary

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
Egyptian Museum — 5,000 years of art & Tutankhamun collection
Citadel of Salah El Din & Mohamed Ali Mosque
Lunch at a local restaurant
Islamic Cairo exploration
Coptic Cairo — Hanging Church, Ben Ezra Synagogue, Abu Serga
Return transfer to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: Nile Pharaoh Dinner Cruise Cairo
tours.description: Board the famous Nile Pharaoh cruise — a 5-star pharaonic barge tribute to the goddess Hathor. Enjoy panoramic Cairo skyline views, a sumptuous international buffet dinner, live belly dance, and the mesmerizing Tanura Sufi whirling dervish show.

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
Arrive at Nile Pharaoh cruise dock
Embark — welcome drinks & Cairo skyline views
International buffet dinner served
Live belly dance & Tanura whirling dervish show
Disembark & return transfer to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: Islamic Cairo: Architectural Heritage in Bab El Wazir
tours.description: Step back in time along El Darb El Ahmar — a street frozen since the Middle Ages, packed with mosques, palaces, mausoleums, and ancient Cairo walls. Explore by golf cart, visit Bab Zuweila gate, the Blue Mosque, and enjoy lunch in the magnificent El Azhar Park with its 1,000-minaret view.
highlights: Bab Zuweila — Cairo's southern gate (1092 AD)
Aqsunqur Mosque — Cairo Blue Mosque (1347 AD)
Golf cart tour through medieval streets
excludes: Any extras not mentioned in the program

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
El Azhar Park — golf cart boarding
Bab Zuweila gate (1092 AD) & El Saleh Tala'i Mosque
Qijmas Ishaqi Mosque & Ahmed El Mehmendar Mosque
Aqsunqur Blue Mosque & Bayt Al-Razziz Palace
Video show at El Azhar Park showroom
Lunch at El Azhar Park restaurant
Return transfer to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: Al Tannoura Egyptian Heritage Dance Show
tours.description: Experience the most amazing Egyptian folk musical night at Wekalet El Ghoury (built 1504 AD). Watch the El Tanoura Troupe — performers in 30+ countries — with folkloric music, the spectacular Tanoura spinning dance, and the spiritual Whirling Dervish finale.
highlights: Wekalet El Ghoury arts center (1504 AD)
excludes: Any extras not mentioned in the program

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
Arrive Wekalet El Ghoury — doors open
Show begins — Egyptian folkloric music
Tanoura spinning dance performance
Whirling Dervish (Darawish) spiritual finale
Return transfer to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: Alexandria City Day Trip
tours.description: Enjoy a full day in Alexandria — Egypt's Mediterranean jewel. Visit the rock-cut Roman Catacombs, Pompey's Pillar, the legendary Citadel of Qaitbay built on the site of the ancient Lighthouse, and the modern Bibliotheca Alexandrina. Enjoy fresh seafood lunch by the sea.
highlights: Catacombs of Kom El-Shoqafa — largest Roman cemetery
Citadel of Qaitbay — site of ancient Lighthouse
Fresh seafood lunch by the Mediterranean
excludes: Any extras not mentioned in the program

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
Arrive Alexandria — Pompey's Pillar
Catacombs of Kom El-Shoqafa (3 levels)
Seafood lunch at a Mediterranean restaurant
Citadel of Qaitbay
Bibliotheca Alexandrina
Depart for Cairo
Return to Cairo hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: Day Tour to El Fayoum Oasis
tours.description: Escape Cairo for the magical Fayoum Oasis. Visit Wadi Hitan (Valley of the Whales) — a UNESCO World Heritage Site with 40-million-year-old whale skeletons — then Mudawara Mountain and the stunning Wadi El Rayan Waterfalls, Egypt's only natural waterfalls.
highlights: Wadi Hitan — UNESCO World Heritage Site
Wadi El Rayan Waterfalls — Egypt's only waterfalls
includes: Lunch at a good quality restaurant
excludes: Any extras not mentioned in the program

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
Arrive Fayoum — head to Wadi El Rayan Protected Area
Wadi Hitan (Valley of the Whales) — UNESCO site
Mudawara Mountain visit
Wadi El Rayan Waterfalls & sand skiing
Late lunch at a local restaurant
Return transfer to Cairo hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: White Desert & Bahariya Oasis (2 Days)
tours.description: A breathtaking 2-day adventure into Egypt's Western Desert. Visit the Black Desert, Crystal Mountain, Valley of Agabat, and camp overnight in the White Desert National Park — home to the world's most extraordinary wind-carved rock formations shaped like giant mushrooms.
highlights: White Desert National Park — unique rock formations
excludes: Any extras not mentioned in the program

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup — drive to Bahariya Oasis (~4 hours)
Arrive Bahariya — lunch at oasis
Black Desert & natural hot spring of El Haize
Crystal Mountain & Valley of Agabat
White Desert National Park — sunset & camp setup
Dinner under the stars in the White Desert
Breakfast at campsite
Bahariya Oasis — Golden Mummy showroom & Nobles' Tombs
Black Mountain climb
Lunch at Bahariya Oasis
Drive back to Cairo hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: El Minya Day Tour from Cairo
tours.description: Escape the tourist crowds and discover Tell Al Amarna — the capital city founded by the revolutionary Pharaoh Akhenaton. Drive south along the Nile to El Minya, then cross by motorboat to explore Beni Hassan's remarkable tombs from the Old and Middle Kingdoms.
highlights: Tell Al Amarna — capital of Pharaoh Akhenaton
excludes: Any extras not mentioned in the program

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
Arrive El Minya
Motorboat to Tell Al Amarna — capital of Akhenaton
Lunch break
Beni Hassan — tombs from Old & Middle Kingdom
Return drive to Cairo hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: Day Trip to Luxor from Cairo by Air
tours.description: Discover the greatness of the ancient Pharaohs in one incredible day. Fly from Cairo to Luxor, visit the legendary Karnak Temple dedicated to God Amon, descend into the Valley of the Kings, and explore the Temple of Queen Hatshepsut — the only woman who reigned as Pharaoh.
highlights: Karnak Temple — greatest temple in history
Valley of the Kings — royal tombs
excludes: Any extras not mentioned in the program

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup — transfer to Cairo Airport
Arrive Luxor Airport — met by representative
Karnak Temple — hypostyle hall & obelisks
Lunch at a local restaurant
Valley of the Kings — royal tombs
Temple of Queen Hatshepsut
Transfer to Luxor Airport
Flight back to Cairo

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign
tours.note: Tour ends ~4:00 PM. Free hotel room provided before evening flight.

tours.title: Hurghada Bedouin Desert Safari by Jeep 4x4
tours.description: Discover Hurghada's Eastern Desert with the Bedouin people. Drive 35 km by Jeep 4x4 through the mountains to a Bedouin village, ride camels, drive quad bikes, witness a stunning desert sunset, and enjoy a barbeque dinner under the stars.
includes: Hotel pickup & return (Hurghada or El Gouna)
excludes: Any extras not mentioned in the program

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup by Jeep 4x4
Drive 35 km into Eastern Desert mountains
Arrive Bedouin village — cultural tour
Camel ride & quad bike experience
Desert sunset photography
Barbeque dinner with mineral water & soft drinks
Stargazing drive back to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: Kalabsha Temple & Nubian Museum — Aswan
tours.description: Visit the Temple of Kalabsha — originally built by Tuthmosis II and restored during the Roman conquest, now re-erected near the High Dam. Then explore the Nubian Museum (opened 1997), displaying thousands of artifacts that would have been lost under Lake Nasser, with life-size Nubian cultural displays.
excludes: Any extras not mentioned in the program

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
Kalabsha Temple — near the High Dam (Western Bank)
Nubian Museum — artifacts & cultural displays
Return transfer to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: Oberoi Philae Nile Cruise (5 Days Luxor–Aswan)
tours.description: Cruise the Nile in ultimate luxury aboard the Oberoi Philae — a 5-star floating palace between Luxor and Aswan. Visit Karnak Temple, Valley of the Kings, Edfu, Kom Ombo, Philae Temple, and the High Dam, with all meals, entertainment, spa, pool, and Egyptologist guides included.
highlights: Valley of the Kings & Hatshepsut Temple
Temple of Edfu — best preserved in Egypt
includes: All transfers by modern A/C vehicle
Full board accommodation on Oberoi Philae
All Nile Cruise excursions as listed
Entrance fees between Luxor and Aswan
excludes: Any extras not mentioned in the program

itinerary.activity: Arrive Luxor — embark Oberoi Philae. Lunch, Karnak Temple & Luxor Temple. Dinner aboard.
Valley of the Kings (King Tut's tomb, Ramesses VI), Hatshepsut Temple, Colossi of Memnon. Sail to Esna.
Temple of Edfu (best preserved in Egypt). Sail to Kom Ombo. Twin Temple of Kom Ombo.
Sail to Aswan. Aswan High Dam, Philae Temple, Nubian Museum.
Breakfast & disembarkation.

tours.meetingPoint: Luxor Airport — met by representative
tours.note: Cruise departs every Sunday. 22 elegantly appointed cabins & luxury suites.

tours.title: Cairo Tower Visit
tours.description: Visit the iconic Cairo Tower — 187 meters high, taller than the Great Pyramid by 50 meters, built on Aswan granite. Ride the elevator to the top in 45 seconds for a full panorama of Cairo, the Pyramids, the Nile, and the Citadel of Salah El Din. Features a café, observation deck, and revolving restaurant.
highlights: 187m high — taller than the Great Pyramid
Panoramic view of Cairo, Pyramids & Nile

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
Arrive Cairo Tower — ticket collection
Elevator to top floor — panoramic views
Revolving restaurant & observation deck
Return transfer to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: Dendera & Abydos Temples — Luxor
tours.description: Drive north from Luxor to see two of the most complete and best-preserved temples in Egypt. Abydos Temple (built by King Seti I, completed by Ramesses II) has the most beautifully preserved paintings in Egypt. Then visit the Temple of Hathor at Dendera — goddess of love and joy — with full color still visible on its walls.
highlights: Abydos Temple of Seti I — most beautiful paintings in Egypt
excludes: Any extras not mentioned in the program

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
Abydos — Temple of Seti I & Osiris Temple
Lunch break
Dendera — Temple of Hathor
Return transfer to Luxor hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: East & West Bank of the Nile — Luxor Full Day
tours.description: See all of Luxor's greatest sites in one day. On the West Bank: Valley of the Kings (tombs of Tutankhamun, Ramesses VI, Amenhotep II), Temple of Hatshepsut, and Colossi of Memnon. On the East Bank: the magnificent Karnak Temple and Luxor Temple built by Amenhotep III.
highlights: Valley of the Kings — tombs of Tutankhamun & Ramesses VI
Karnak Temple — greatest temple in history
excludes: Any extras not mentioned in the program

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
West Bank — Valley of the Kings (3 tombs)
Temple of Queen Hatshepsut (Deir el-Bahari)
Colossi of Memnon photo stop
Lunch at a local restaurant
East Bank — Karnak Temple complex
Luxor Temple & Avenue of Sphinxes
Return transfer to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: St. Simeon Monastery — Aswan
tours.description: Visit the ancient St. Simeon Monastery (originally Anba Hatre Monastery), located opposite the southern tip of Elephantine Island in Aswan. Dating back to the 6th century, its principal church was built in the 10th–11th century and is the oldest of its kind in Egypt.
highlights: Oldest church of its kind in Egypt
excludes: Any extras not mentioned in the program

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
St. Simeon Monastery — guided tour
Return transfer to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: Nile Felucca Sail
tours.description: Sail the Nile on a traditional Egyptian felucca — the same wooden boats used since the time of the Pharaohs. A peaceful, timeless experience on the world's greatest river, with gentle breezes and beautiful riverside scenery.

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
Arrive felucca dock — board traditional boat
Sail the Nile — enjoy scenery & breeze
Return to dock & transfer back to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: National Museum of Egyptian Civilization
tours.description: Visit the world's first museum to exhibit a comprehensive view of Egyptian civilization from prehistory to modern history. See the oldest prosthetic toe in the world, a 30,000-year-old human skeleton, the last Kaaba Cover made in Egypt, and the Mahmal ceremonial carriage.
highlights: Last Kaaba Cover (Kiswaa) made in Egypt

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
Arrive National Museum of Egyptian Civilization
Main Exhibition Hall — pottery, wood, textile & ornaments
Special exhibits — prosthetic toe, skeleton, Kaaba Cover
Return transfer to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: The Grand Egyptian Museum (GEM)
tours.description: Tour the largest archaeological museum in the world — home to the complete Tutankhamun collection and over 100,000 ancient artifacts, many displayed for the first time. See the Hanging Obelisk, King Ramses II statue, 10 statues of King Senusert, and the Grand Staircase.
highlights: Hanging Obelisk & King Ramses II statue

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle
Arrive Grand Egyptian Museum
Tutankhamun collection — complete treasures
Ramses II statue, Grand Staircase & Hanging Obelisk
Ptolemaic galleries & Victory column
Return transfer to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: Tok-Tok of Giza
tours.description: Experience Egyptian life from its roots on a fun Tok-Tok (tuk-tuk) ride through Giza. Visit local neighborhoods, old Egyptian houses, take souvenir photos, stop at the supermarket for snacks and drinks — a genuine, off-the-tourist-track experience with local music and a friendly guide.

itinerary.activity: Driver picks you up from hotel by Tok-Tok
Tour through local Giza neighborhoods
Old Egyptian houses — photo stops
Local supermarket visit
Return to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — Tok-Tok driver waiting

tours.title: Relaxation Day — Spa & Massage
tours.description: After a long journey, treat yourself to a professional relaxation session at our hotel spa. Our certified physiotherapists specialize in muscle therapy and offer various massage treatments in air-conditioned private rooms to bring you to complete comfort.

itinerary.activity: Check in at hotel spa reception
Consultation with physiotherapist
45-minute back massage session
Relaxation & recovery time

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel spa — ground floor

tours.title: Red Sea — El Ain El Sokhna Beach Day
tours.description: Escape the city for a relaxing day at El Ain El Sokhna on the Red Sea — just 100 km from Cairo. Swim in crystal-clear waters, sunbathe on the beach, and enjoy a full day use at a hotel with lunch included. The perfect recharge day between sightseeing.
tours.location: El Ain El Sokhna, Red Sea
highlights: El Ain El Sokhna — 100 km from Cairo

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup in private A/C vehicle

Lunch at beach hotel
Afternoon beach & pool time
Return drive to Cairo hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign

tours.title: Hot Air Balloon Ride — Luxor
tours.description: Soar above one of the world's greatest open-air museums at sunrise. Float over the Valley of the Kings, Hatshepsut Temple, and the Nile Valley in a breathtaking hot air balloon flight — the best way to experience Luxor's ancient wonders from above.
highlights: Aerial views of Valley of the Kings

itinerary.activity: Hotel pickup — drive to launch site
Safety briefing & balloon preparation
Balloon rises — 1-hour flight over Luxor
Landing & return transfer to hotel

tours.meetingPoint: Hotel lobby — driver waiting with name sign
tours.note: Sharing tour. Book 3 trips and get the 4th FREE — ask the hotel!
